chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-2432 of 2022 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For hearing of CMA No.10947/2022 2.For hearing of main case. 20.03.2025 Mr.Darvesh K. Madhan, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr.Kashif Nazeer, Assistant Attorney General. Mr.Khalid Rajpar, Advocate for the Respondent Nos.2 and 4.. Mr.Rana Sakhawat Ali, Advocate holding brief for Mr.Mirza Nadeem Taqi, Advocate for Respondent No.3 Mr.Tahir Khalil, Advocate holding brief for Mr.M.Khalil Dogar, Advocate for Respondent. It is jointly submitted that this petition is squarely covered by a judgment of this Court dated 10.09.2021 passed in C.P.No.D-5430/2020 and connected petitions, hence, this petition may be disposed of in terms thereof. Order accordingly. Judge Judge nasir
